message:
🐛 Fix CreatePolicyModal buttons disabled despite cluster selected (#1456)

The two competing useEffects (auto-select and reset) caused a race
condition where reset always won, leaving selectedCluster as '' and
all flow buttons disabled. Merged into a single effect that resets
state and auto-selects the first installed cluster atomically.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
